utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with flight details and costs), accommodation (with hotel details and costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (cost breakdown). The final package includes all these items: destination (Lisbon, Portugal), travel_dates (June 13–17, 2024), transportation (detailed flight info with cost), accommodation (hotel info with cost), activities (three with names, dates, and costs), additional_services (explicitly stated 'None requested'), and total_budget (€1,640 with taxes and fees included). Each item is fully specified with sufficient details per the format.
